title: Ahtna Netiye’ Announces Roy Tansy Jr. as CEO
summary: Ahtna Netiye’, LLC is pleased to announce the promotion of Roy Tansy, Jr. to Chief Executive Officer (CEO). In his role, which will go into effect February 19, he is responsible for providing strategic leadership for Ahtna, Incorporated’s operational subsidiaries. Roy is a longtime advocate of Ahtna...
